nasb.text: You provided bread from heaven for them for their hunger, You brought forth water from a rock for them for their thirst, And You told them to enter in order to possess The land which You swore to give them.

esv.text: You gave them bread from heaven for their hunger and brought water for them out of the rock for their thirst, and you told them to go in to possess the land that you had sworn to give them.

cnv.text: 你從天上賜下糧食，給他們充飢， 吩咐水從磐石流出來給他們解渴； 你又吩咐他們進去佔領， 你舉手起誓要賜給他們的那地。

ccb.text: 他们饿了，你赐下天粮给他们吃；他们渴了，你使磐石流出水给他们喝。你吩咐他们去占领你起誓赐给他们的土地。
